reviews.review_description:
Great idea , already bought it!

But it's not playing music when you "minimize" it 

You gotta keep it open which is annoying and blocking the game I'm playing. Please look into that. 

Everything else works correctly.💯

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback! We've identified and fixed the background playback issue. The latest update (v1.2) includes:

✅ Music now continues playing when you minimize the app
✅ Works perfectly while gaming - no more interruptions
✅ Fully functional notification controls (play, pause, skip)
✅ Independent volume control to balance music with game audio

The update should be available on the Meta Quest Store within 3 days. We really appreciate your support and patience!
